UberChatbot__Sheet1.WelcomeCopy: Want to know what you can hit?
UberChatbot__Sheet1.FourCopy: Score a 4 each time you book UberAuto, UberMoto, UberPool, UberGo or with an Eats Order between Rs 100 and Rs 250
UberChatbot__Sheet1.SixHeadline: You hit it out of the park!
UberChatbot__Sheet1.SixCopy:
Score a 6 each time you book UberPremier, UberIntercity, UberXL, UberHire or with an Eats
Order above Rs 250
UberChatbot__Sheet1.WhatNextCopy: More Uber rides means more runs could get you weekly prizes and a chance to watch the World Cup in England!
